feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CSRF token retrieval fails when making calls from the SAP BTP ABAP environment to an S/4 HANA on-pre
entry.content:
Hello team,

I am trying to call the S/4 HANA on premise system from ABAP Environment via Destinations.

GET Call is working as expected. 

Below is the code. I am trying to do the post call based on some input parameter

DATA(http_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination(

i_name = CONV #( <fs_sap_systems>-destination_name )

i_authn_mode = if_a4c_cp_service=>service_specific ).

 

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( http_destination ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZSCM_USER_LOCKED'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

 

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZS_USER_LOCKS_SRV1111/' ).

 

" Prepare business data

ls_business_data = VALUE #( uname = is_user_locked_st-uname ).

 

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'USER_LIST_LOCK_SET' )->create_request_for_create( ).

 

" Set the business data for the created entity

lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).

 

lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).

After executing the statement, I encounter a CSRF token failed exception. Is there a need to upload any certificate on the S/4 HANA side?

entry.title: drop down field auto update on alv grid display
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am using cl_gui_alv_grid and my requirement is I have having 100s of records in the internal table and there is dropdown functionality for remarks.
When the user selects the value in the first record the same should be able to reflect for all the records in the same column rather than user
manually selecting each and every one.

I could able to manage to get into the internal table by looping the record and passing the fixed value but upon using refresh_table_display it is not getting updated on the screen.
I mean I can not able to see the first dropdown value in the rest of the fields.
I have tried with passing stable parameter to the refresh_table_display but no luck.
I just want to see all the columns of the dropdown field gets filled when I select in the first row with the same value.
Kindly help me with it as it is urgent requirement from the business.

Please consider the object gv_alv3 in the below screenshot as gv_alv is altogether different screen.

In debugging I could able to see the remarks column getting updated with values for all records but when I do F8 it is not visible on the grid.

entry.title: Find different version of objects overwritten by one big transport request
entry.content:
Hey,

I am trying to find all the objects contained in a transport request that have different versions between two systems.

Background: We imported a transport request with nearly 10 000 objects, and some of them were older versions than we had on the target system. Now we dont know which objects exacly are impacted, and we are trying to go trough the whole list of the transport request and compare between the two systems. Basically if the version is newer on dev system than it is the current active version on test system, we would like to get a list of such objects.

Is there a known way of doing this ? Or would we have to develop some sort of report, and if so, does anyone have any good tips to begin with ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: select query with for all entries not fetching the records
entry.content:
HI gurus, I am uploading excel file with bukrs gjahr augbl utr_no and utr_date into internal table gt_upload.
I have moved only 3 fields from gt_upload to lt_upload bukrs gjahr and augbl by looping gt_upload( though ideally not required to do so)

MY requirement is to fetch records from bseg based on bukrs gjahr augbl and shkzg as 'S'.

The lt_upload contains 126 records of which 125 records not exist with bukrs gjahr and augbl in the bseg itself as due to old data and quality system has not yet refreshed. I can see the last record exist in the bseg table.

I should get at least this record into my lt_bseg but, lt_bseg is showing 0 records.

I believe as per my understanding there should be 1 record which matches the criteria and I should get 1 record in lt_bseg which is not
happening.

What all are the possible reasons that it is not getting fetched from bseg when the criteria is satisfied ?

entry.title: Custom CDS View Through Eclipse While Deprecated i am getting Error in Public Cloud System
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have Created One Custom CDS View through Eclipse and Released the Task to Customizing tenant.

Now i want to Deprecated status back to Normal, I am trying to do that Deprecated but i am getting Error.

 

This is the Error i am getting. So please suggest if i missed something to do.

entry.title: Preview button using RAP Eclipse.
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I wan to know is it possible to create the Preview function In-Dev extensibility by using RAP. 

There will be custom business object with some fields created from RAP using Eclipse. 

And I want to add the preview button which will show the fields of business object in PDF file as in below picture. 

#In-Dev extensibility, #preview, #pdf,#RAP

entry.title: PR should not allow to change the PR Qty after PO created
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I'm having a requirement to put control on me54n. once PO created user should not allow to change the PR qty details on me54n .

example : suppose I have created the PR with 10 qty and I have done po creation , now again i went to me54n and unrelease the release strategy then change the PR qty from 10 to 15. Now i need a control here , system should not allow the change on PR once PO created.

can anyone help me on this....

entry.title: C_ABAPD_2309 - SAP Certified Associate - Back End Developer ABAP Cloud.
entry.content: Hi All, I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_ABAPD_2309 - SAP Certified Associate - Back End Developer ABAP Cloud. ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Special character # -issue in the file generated
entry.content:
hi All,

We are using SAP Integration Suite for converting the input XML file into a fixed-length flat file and placing it in the AL11 directory of the SAP system. The file present in the AL11 folder does not contain the ‘#’ character at the end of each line, but while processing it further in the SAP system, the records shows ‘#’ at the end, due to which it cannot be processed further. There is standard SAP ABAP code and we cannot alter it to ignore this special character

Could anybody advice the possible reason and resolution for this?Could this be added by the Integration layer. 

flat file being generated 

 

Processing records at SAP

entry.title: Account requires an account assignment error is coming while executing the program RKO7CO88
entry.content:
Hi ABAP Experts,

While executing the program RKO7CO88 with the input at the selection screen, I am getting the error as highlighted in yellow.

I tried debugging and found that error is coming from this subroutine.

Error is happening because ld_real = 0 and other conditions as below screenshot is satisfying.

My query is

1. Is there any configuration set up which is not maintained as a result we are getting this error.

2. Is there any other way to resolve this error? We are in S/4 HANA system.

entry.title: Custom ABAP CDS Views in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Three parts to this question

1. Can I extend a standard ABAP CDS and create a custom ABAP CDS view on top of it and expose it as OData Service (Consumption view) so it can be consumed in SAP SAC?

2. Can I create a fully customizable CDS view all the way (Basic, Composite and Consumption views) and expose it as OData Service for SAP SAC?

3. To expose as OData Service is there a specific Fiori Tile similar to /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE exist in SAP Public Cloud?

Thank you,

Arthur

entry.title: F4 help for custom application job
entry.content:
Hi members,

I want to create a custom application job with f4 help.
I used IF_APJ_RT_VALUE_HELP_EXIT this interface to create a class and assigned it to application job catalog entry as value help.

 But the value help is not visible in when scheduling the application job.

 Please let me know if there is any other way to add value help to the parameters in custom application job or am I missing anything.

Regards,
Bharath

entry.title: About cloudready type when creating an adaptation project
entry.content:
Hi All, I'm expanding the standard 'manage purchase orders' app.

When creating an Adaptation Project, what is the application condition that the project type is cloudReady?

I want to create the Manage Purchase Orders application as an Adaptation Project, but it doesn't appear in the list because the type is not cloudready.

 

I originally thought that if the app type was sap s/4hana cloud, it was in a cloudready state. However, this app did not appear on the available list.

Is this app not actually working? Or is there something I need to configure?

 

Please help. thanks.

entry.title: Password policy update on SAP netweaver
entry.content:
Hi all, anyone could answer this. If I apply a new password policy in SAP NetWeaver such as the minimum password length, expiration time, password history size, and maximum idle time, it will have affect in any integrated systems users like those using the CUST_USER_ADMIN_ROLE that access the HANA database, etc?

Does it force to update their own password?

Thank you,

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: do I need a test double for 'me' method call in method under test?
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a method for which I am writing ABAP Unit test:

 

METHOD do_sth.
"Below method call sets a global attribute value
me->get_facet( ).

"Below method call returns internal table
lt_catlog = me->build_catalog( ).

**other code in method**

ENDMETHOD.

 

do I need to mock the above two method calls as well? how can I achieve this?
I think get_facet( ) and build_catalog( ) calls need mocking. Moreover I have already written test for these two methods individually.

entry.title: Add default value to custom field - CFL
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have added one custom field using Custom Field Fiori App. I want to pass default value to this filed.

Business Context - EAMS_NTF

I have checked following Badi. But here I can't see my custom field.

BADI_EVENT_PRIORITIZATION
EAM_NOTIFICATION_FIELD_CONTROL
EAM_LTXT_TML_MAINT_NOTIF

Can you suggest any other way I can pass the value?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can Anyone tell me how to use this following BAPI to create multiple inforecords?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on a program where I am uploading an excel file and posting the data into the bapi  me_inforecord_maintain_multi  .

But Inforecords Number not getting generated from the bapi, though sy-subrc = 0 after the bapi execution!

Below Posting my code. For each item there should be unique inforecods number, means for 5 materials in the file there should be 5 infnr.

Getting bapi lt_return table message as "material is not activated" .

Tried with leading zeros in matnr , still not working.

 


  CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      i_begin_col             = '1'
      i_begin_row             = p_brow
      i_end_col               = '170'
      i_end_row               = p_erow
    TABLES
      intern                  = it_exload
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_parameters = 1
      upload_ole              = 2
      OTHERS                  = 3.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Problem in excel sheet'  TYPE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT zno
      FROM zinfo
      ORDER BY zno DESCENDING
      INTO @DATA(l_sl)
      UP TO 1 ROWS.
  ENDSELECT.

  l_sl = l_sl + 1.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = l_sl
    IMPORTING
      output = l_sl.

  SORT it_exload BY row col.

  LOOP AT it_exload INTO wa_exload.

    CASE wa_exload-col.
      WHEN '0001'.
        lw_acc-matnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0002'.
        lw_acc-lifnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0003'.
        lw_acc-ekorg = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0004'.
        lw_acc-werks = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0005'.
        lw_acc-ekgrp = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0006'.
        lw_acc-aplfz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0007'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'KCD_EXCEL_DATE_CONVERT'
          EXPORTING
            excel_date  = wa_exload-value
            date_format = 'TMJ'
          IMPORTING
            sap_date    = wa_exload-value.

        lw_acc-valid_from = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0008'.
        lw_acc-waers = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0009'.
        lw_acc-netpr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0010'.
        lw_acc-peinh = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0011'.
        lw_acc-bprme = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0012'.
        lw_acc-bpumz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0013'.
        lw_acc-bpumn = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0014'.
        lw_acc-lmein = wa_exload-value.

    ENDCASE.

    AT END OF row.


      lw_acc-zno = l_sl.
      lw_acc-vaild_to = '99991231'.
      lw_acc-kschl = 'PB00'.

      APPEND lw_acc TO lt_acc.
      CLEAR lw_acc.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.


  SELECT
          a~matnr,
          b~meins

    FROM @LT_acc AS a INNER JOIN
    mara AS b
    ON
      ltrim( a~matnr, '0' ) = ltrim( b~matnr, '0' )
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_unit).




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa_acc).

    IF wa_acc-matnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lifnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekorg IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-werks IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekgrp IS INITIAL
    OR wa_acc-valid_from IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-waers IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-netpr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-peinh IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bprme IS INITIAL .

      MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
    ENDIF.

    READ TABLE it_unit INTO DATA(wa_unit) WITH  KEY matnr = wa_acc-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_OUTPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa_unit-meins
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa_unit-meins.


    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      IF wa_unit-meins <> wa_acc-bprme.
        IF wa_acc-bpumz IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bpumn IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lmein IS INITIAL.
          MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
          LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa).


    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-matnr IMPORTING output = wa-matnr.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-lifnr IMPORTING output = wa-lifnr.



APPEND VALUE #( material =  wa-matnr
                vendor =   wa-lifnr )
 TO itab1.

APPEND VALUE #( material =  'X'
                vendor =   'X' )
 TO itab2.

APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = wa-ekorg  plant = wa-werks pur_group = wa-ekgrp plnd_delry = wa-aplfz gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab3.
APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = 'X'  plant = 'X' pur_group = 'X' plnd_delry = 'X' gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab4.
APPEND VALUE #( valid_from = wa-valid_from valid_to = wa-vaild_to  )
 TO itab5.


  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa-lmein
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa-lmein.


APPEND VALUE #( cond_type = wa-kschl currency = wa-waers cond_value = wa-netpr  cond_p_unt  = wa-peinh
cond_unit = wa-bprme numerator = wa-bpumz  denominator = wa-bpumn base_uom = wa-lmein )
 TO itab6.


    MODIFY lt_acc FROM wa.


  ENDLOOP.




  CALL FUNCTION 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI'
    IMPORTING
      et_eina       = lt_eina_e
      et_eine       = lt_eine_e
    TABLES
      t_eina        = itab1
      t_einax       = itab2
      t_eine        = itab3
      t_einex       = itab4
      cond_validity = itab5
      condition     = itab6
      return        = lt_return.











  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    LOOP AT lt_acc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

      READ TABLE lt_eina_e ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH  KEY material = <fs>-matnr.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        <fs>-infnr = <fs1>-info_rec.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: CDS view for quantity confirmed in production order
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am looking for a CDS view in SAP Public Cloud for the following:

1. Actual quantity confirmed in production order along with movement type

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material Combination in sales SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

As per the requirement by Business,I wanted to create a report for a pricing simulation of sales order where price is maintained on Customer/Material Combination with Discount and Tax value.Please suggest a solution where I can fetch data in the form of report.

Also,kindly suggest a CDS View if available as its a priority kindly help 

Regards 

Dhanush

entry.title: Issue regarding multiple line items
entry.content: Hello dear experts. In my report there are multiple line items but when I pull data from the report through code only 1 item is showing multiple items. Please help I am stuck
